expected: Every panel includes an OpenAI Image prompt block.
The guide includes a run-level OpenAI panel execution brief.
Lettering remains separated from image generation prompts.
forbidden: Provider-specific prompt blocks missing from any panel.
Visible text instructions embedded directly in the image prompt.
Run-level instructions that permit live research or new clinical claims.
graderNotes: Rendering guide quality should prove the run is ready for manual panel retries and reviewer prompt inspection.

expected: The execution brief tells the model to keep one final image per panel.
Prompt guidance forbids live research and requires use of supplied panel content.
Clinically material panels keep claim references and continuity anchors.
forbidden: Missing claim references on clinically important panels.
No continuity reference instruction for later panels.
Prompt instructions that bake lettering directly into the generated art.
graderNotes: The guide is secondary, but it still needs to be strong enough for manual rerenders and QA.
